name_cn:
Dior Groove🔆 20 Handbag "Small Blue"
This Dior Groove 20 handbag is a new addition to the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from blue calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The zip lock can be opened with the included key charm. The spacious compartment features an open pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. With a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily styling.
Zip closure with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key pouch embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, comes with a key.
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal open pocket
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 1 card holder, sunglasses and lipstick
